chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD 1st Appeal No.10 of 2022 Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Appellant: Furqan Ahmed s/o Abdul Rasheed Ghori, Through Mr.Urooj Aqeel, Advocate Respondent: Muhammad Farhan s/o Muhammad Ibrahim, Nemo. Date of hearing: 01.12.2025 Date of Order: 02.12.2025 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded, the above-titled 1st appeal is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
